calendar.matters:
ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Sep-23-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on calendar regularly this day for hearing on petition changing name. Present: Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia Dowling. Petitioner is sworn and examined. The Court grants the decree changing petitioner's name to Zoe Olivia Corsi. Decree signed.
